query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.email, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.status,
  p.payment_status, p.payment_intent_id, p.mandate_id,
  p.joining_fee_paid, p.joining_fee_paid_at,
  p.created_at, p.invite_token
FROM prospects p
WHERE p.email = 'astmeridian@outlook.com'
LIMIT 5;
